📖 OUR NEW 2026 PUBS DIRECTORS

Beyond the headlines. The Publications team is dedicated to deep-diving into the global shifts that actually matter. They translate complex market trends into the insights you need to stay ahead of the curve.

The editors: 
✍️ Beau 
✍️ Tanishka

The smartest in the room. 🌍

🥂 OUR NEW 2026 EVENTS DIRECTORS

Your social life, curated. The Events team handles the logistics so you can handle the vibes. From high-stakes networking to the nights you’ll actually remember, they’re the reason you’re showing up!

🎟️ Lily
🎟️ Joshua
